title: Kunax's Random Stuff
description: sometimes I want stuff in the game that I just cant find in mods so I decided to make them myself
body:
## DO NOT REDISTRIBUTE

# Kunax's Random Stuff

>  MOST OF THE STUFF HAVE NO CRAFTING RECIPES, USE CREATIVE FOR MOST ITEMS

sometimes i cant find stuff that i want in the game in mods so i decided why not just make them myself, so yea this is just what that is.

> A list of some stuff included:
- Zenith, the result of combining all the swords to exist, even with only 6 swords its still the best!
- Tool Gun, delete anything instantly!
- Crowbar "    " - Dr. Freeman
- Portal Gun, Go anywhere you want!
- Knife
- Heartstealer Enchantment
  
Theres much more but i dont really have time to list everything because i actually have a life.



### Modpack Guidelines:
- You must link to this mod in your modpack description or in-game.
- You can only distribute the modpack on Modrinth or Curseforge.
